title: Huffman-Optimized TapTrees
description: A Huffman-optimized TapTree places more likely spending paths closer to the root so the average revealed proof path is shorter. It is a specific Taproot tree-construction optimization, not a different spend rule or proof format.

resources.title: Bitcoin Optech Schnorr/Taproot Workshop
resources.notes: Workshop module 2.5 shows how to arrange TapTree leaves by expected spend probability to reduce average reveal cost.

resources.title: BIP 341: Taproot
resources.notes: Formal Taproot commitment reference for the tree and proof structure that Huffman ordering is optimizing.

resources.title: Programming Bitcoin
resources.notes: Background reference for Merkle commitments, script trees, and transaction-size tradeoffs behind this optimization.
